# Secondary Findings (ACMG)

```{r sf_pdf_setup}
#| echo: false
#| eval: true

variants_sf <- 
  cps_report$content$snv_indel$callset$variant_display$sf
n_sf <- NROW(variants_sf)
```

```{r sf_table}
#| echo: false
#| eval: !expr n_sf > 0

variants_sf |>
  dplyr::select(
    SYMBOL, CONSEQUENCE, ALTERATION, GENOTYPE,
    CLINVAR_CLASSIFICATION
  ) |>
  tinytable::tt() |>
  tinytable::style_tt(
    i = 0, background = "black", 
    color = "white", bold = TRUE) |>
  tinytable::theme_tt("tabular")
```

```{r sf_none_msg}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
#| eval: !expr n_sf == 0
cat("*No reportable secondary findings identified.*")
```
